name: apple-craft
description: Apple platform development with Xcode tools, bundled references, and review workflows.

interface.shortDescription: Swift, SwiftUI, UIKit, AppKit, and Xcode development
interface.longDescription: Build, troubleshoot, review, and orchestrate Apple platform work using Xcode tools plus bundled reference docs and evidence-driven verification for current Apple APIs.
defaultPrompt: Help with Apple platform development using Xcode tools, official docs, and bundled Apple references, and verify changes with build, preview, or diagnostics evidence when possible.
Review Swift and Apple platform code using Apple-specific correctness, API usage, and framework guidance rather than generic style-only comments.
Run a long Apple platform workflow with planner/builder/evaluator roles, PLAN→DESIGN→BUILD→EVALUATE loops, shared artifacts, and evidence-driven Xcode verification.
